title: Bluesky’s new app is an AI for customizing your feed
summary: Bluesky unveiled Attie, an AI assistant powered by Anthropic's Claude that enables users to build custom feeds through natural language queries. Currently available as a standalone app, Attie is planned for integration into Bluesky and other AT Protocol applications.
content:
The latest app from the team behind Bluesky is Attie, an AI assistant that lets you build your own algorithm. At the Atmosphere conference, Bluesky's former CEO, Jay Graber, and CTO Paul Frazee, unveiled Attie, which is powered by Anthropic's Claude and built on top of Bluesky's underlying AT Protocol (atproto). 
Attie allows users to create custom feeds using natural language. For example, you could ask for "posts about folklore, mythology, and traditional music, especially Celtic traditions." To start these custom feeds will be confined to a standalone Attie app. But the plan is to make them available in Bluesky and other atproto apps. 
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Bluesky的新应用是一个用于自定义你的信息源的AI
zh.summary: Bluesky推出了Attie，一个由Anthropic的Claude驱动的AI助手，使用户能够通过自然语言查询构建自定义信息源。目前作为独立应用程序可用，Attie计划与Bluesky和其他AT协议应用程序集成。

fr.title: La nouvelle application de Bluesky est une IA pour personnaliser votre flux
fr.summary: Bluesky a dévoilé Attie, un assistant IA alimenté par Claude d'Anthropic qui permet aux utilisateurs de créer des flux personnalisés via des requêtes en langage naturel. Actuellement disponible en tant qu'application autonome, Attie devrait être intégrée à Bluesky et à d'autres applications du protocole AT.

de.title: Blueskys neue App ist eine KI zur Anpassung Ihres Feeds
de.summary: Bluesky stellte Attie vor, einen KI-Assistenten, der von Anthropics Claude betrieben wird und es Benutzern ermöglicht, benutzerdefinierte Feeds durch natürlichsprachige Abfragen zu erstellen. Derzeit als eigenständige App verfügbar, ist Attie für die Integration in Bluesky und andere AT-Protokoll-Anwendungen geplant.

es.title: La nueva aplicación de Bluesky es una IA para personalizar tu feed
es.summary: Bluesky presentó Attie, un asistente de IA impulsado por Claude de Anthropic que permite a los usuarios crear feeds personalizados mediante consultas en lenguaje natural. Actualmente disponible como una aplicación independiente, Attie está prevista para su integración en Bluesky y otras aplicaciones del protocolo AT.

title: Red Rooms makes online poker as thrilling as its serial killer
summary: The thriller 'Red Rooms' stands out for accurately portraying technology and dark web elements, with director Pascal Plante's expert tension-building allowing technical details to enhance rather than distract from the narrative.
content:
Juliette Gariépy’s Kelly-Anne is an uncomfortable mystery. | Image: Nemesis Films Productions	

It's rare for a movie to get technology right. And it's even rarer for that movie to be a thriller or horror, where realism takes a backseat to scares and tension. But Red Rooms mostly gets it. Nothing takes me out of a film quicker than a tech MacGuffin that might as well be literal magic. Yes, the phrase "dark web" will always sound a bit silly, but at no point during its 118 minutes does the tech become a distraction. 
It's not the tech that makes Red Rooms great, though. It's just something that could have easily tanked an otherwise excellent movie. What carries the film is the expert tension building by director Pascal Plante. The perf …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《红房间》让在线扑克和连环杀手一样刺激
zh.summary: 惊悚片《红房间》因准确描绘技术和暗网元素而脱颖而出，导演帕斯卡尔·普兰特的专业紧张感营造让技术细节能够增强而非分散叙事的注意力。

fr.title: Red Rooms rend le poker en ligne aussi palpitant que son tueur en série
fr.summary: Le thriller « Red Rooms » se distingue par sa représentation précise de la technologie et des éléments du dark web, avec la construction experte de la tension du réalisateur Pascal Plante permettant aux détails techniques d'améliorer plutôt que de distraire du récit.

de.summary: Der Thriller „Red Rooms" zeichnet sich durch eine genaue Darstellung von Technologie und Dark-Web-Elementen aus. Die Expertenfähigkeit des Regisseurs Pascal Plante beim Aufbau von Spannung ermöglicht es, dass technische Details die Erzählung eher verbessern als abzulenken.

es.title: Red Rooms hace que el póquer en línea sea tan emocionante como su asesino en serie
es.summary: El thriller "Red Rooms" destaca por retratar con precisión elementos de tecnología y la dark web, con la construcción experta de tensión del director Pascal Plante permitiendo que los detalles técnicos mejoren en lugar de distraer de la narrativa.

title: Sora’s shutdown could be a reality check moment for AI video

Diese Entwicklung könnte eine Kalibrierung der Prioritäten des KI-Video-Marktes signalisieren.

El desarrollo podría señalar una recalibración de las prioridades del mercado de video de IA.

title: Can my favorite Game Boy gadget tell fake cartridges from real?
summary: The GB Operator, a $50 device for backing up Game Boy cartridges, now offers a mobile app to verify authenticity and estimate cartridge value before purchase. Initial testing reveals the verification tool works well for most cartridges but occasionally produces false positives and negatives.
content:
The GB Operator. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

The $50 Epilogue GB Operator has a brand-new trick up its sleeve. In addition to backing up Game Boy, Game Boy Color and Game Boy Advance cartridges and saves to a PC (and writing saves back to carts again!), it can now plug into your phone with a brand-new Retrace app for Android and iOS. The idea: check if cartridges are legit, and how much they're worth, before you buy or sell them.
Is it reliable? I plugged around 50 cartridges into the app, and… it could use some work. While most of my English and Japanese library was detected without a hitch, it also called a few counterfeit cartridges "authentic," a number of authentic cartridges "co …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我最喜欢的Game Boy设备能区分假卡带吗？
zh.summary: GB Operator是一个价格50美元的设备，用于备份Game Boy卡带，现在提供了一个移动应用程序来验证真伪并在购买前估计卡带价值。初步测试表明验证工具对大多数卡带效果很好，但偶尔会产生假阳性和假阴性。

fr.title: Mon gadget Game Boy préféré peut-il distinguer les vraies cartouches des fausses ?
fr.summary: Le GB Operator, un appareil de 50 dollars pour sauvegarder les cartouches Game Boy, propose désormais une application mobile pour vérifier l'authenticité et estimer la valeur de la cartouche avant l'achat. Les tests initiaux révèlent que l'outil de vérification fonctionne bien pour la plupart des cartouches, mais produit parfois des faux positifs et des faux négatifs.

de.title: Kann mein Lieblings-Game-Boy-Gadget echte Cartridges von gefälschten unterscheiden?
de.summary: Der GB Operator, ein 50-Dollar-Gerät zum Sichern von Game-Boy-Cartridges, bietet jetzt eine mobile App zur Authentifizierungsüberprüfung und zur Schätzung des Cartridge-Wertes vor dem Kauf. Erste Tests zeigen, dass das Verifikationstool für die meisten Cartridges gut funktioniert, aber gelegentlich Falschpositive und Falschnegativen verursacht.

es.title: ¿Puede mi gadget favorito de Game Boy distinguir cartuchos falsificados de auténticos?
es.summary: El GB Operator, un dispositivo de $50 para hacer copias de seguridad de cartuchos de Game Boy, ahora ofrece una aplicación móvil para verificar la autenticidad y estimar el valor del cartucho antes de la compra. Las pruebas iniciales revelan que la herramienta de verificación funciona bien para la mayoría de los cartuchos, pero ocasionalmente produce falsos positivos y falsos negativos.

title: There is no ethical consumption of HBO’s Harry Potter series
summary: HBO is developing an ambitious Harry Potter series adaptation targeting a new generation of viewers, with potential to become a major streaming phenomenon. Questions remain about ethical consumption concerns and J.K. Rowling's continued involvement in the franchise.
content:
In the coming years, HBO wants its new Harry Potter series to become "the streaming event of the decade" as it adapts each of the franchise's seven original books. The show could very well become a hit that captures the imaginations of a new generation of fans who weren't there for the first wave of Pottermania that intensified with the releases of each book and Warner Bros.' subsequent film adaptations. And if this Harry Potter is a success, it could give author J.K. Rowling a reason to consider writing more stories set in the magical world that turned her into a billionaire.
But all of that hinges on whether people will actually watch HBO …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is a great time to get a fancy, AI-powered bird feeder
summary: Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers significant discounts on AI-powered smart bird feeders, including the Netvue Birdfy Feeder and BirdBuddy Pro, featuring cameras, species identification, and motion alerts. The models differ in video quality, hardware integration, and subscription pricing for premium features.
content:
Bird feeders have come a long way since their inception in the early 1900s. These days, it’s not all that surprising to see feeders kitted out with cameras and solar roofs, two marquee features you’ll find on feeders from both BirdBuddy and Netvue. And while modern hoppers can command a pretty penny, Amazon’s Big Spring Sale has dropped the Netvue Birdfy Feeder to $135.99 ($124 off) and Birdbuddy Pro to $179.99 ($120 off), which are some of the best prices we’ve seen.
At their core, both smart bird feeders are designed to help you keep an eye on your soon-to-be feathery friends, allowing for image stills, video, notifications, and AI-powered identification. Birdfy’s offering cuts corners on hardware to keep costs down, though. It features the widest viewing angle of any model at 155 degrees; however, the video quality maxes out at 1080p, whereas the Birdbuddy Pro allows you to capture crystal-clear 2K video (with slow-mo). The accompanying solar panel isn’t integrated directly into the snap-on roof like it is with the Pro, either, which means it doesn’t look quite as slick once set up.
Netvue Birdfy Feeder

Where to Buy:

 $259.99 $135.99 at Amazon (yellow)
 $259.99 $159.99 at Amazon (blue)

Software-wise, both motion-activated feeders support 2.4GHz Wi-Fi and feature robust, user-friendly apps that can identify species and alert you when a bird is present. Birdbuddy’s is a bit more lively and capable if you’re willing to subscribe to Birdbuddy Premium ($69.99 a year), which unlocks additional info via an AI-powered chat, unlimited video storage, and the ability to track returning visitors, plus the option to view Birdbuddy feeds from around the world. That said, Birdfy’s bird recognition software is free for life — at least with the bundle on offer here — meaning you won’t have to routinely pay for a subscription just to access the essentials. Just be prepared for lots of notifications.
Birdbuddy Pro (solar)

Where to Buy:

 $299 $179 at Amazon

zh.title: 亚马逊大春季销售是购买花哨AI驱动喂鸟器的好时机
zh.summary: 亚马逊大春季销售在AI驱动的智能喂鸟器上提供显著折扣，包括Netvue Birdfy喂鸟器和BirdBuddy Pro，具有摄像头、物种识别和运动警报。这些型号在视频质量、硬件集成和高级功能的订阅定价方面有所不同。

title: The Macintosh changed computers forever
summary: The Macintosh transformed computing through both its innovative interface design and legendary Super Bowl advertisement, though the original device had limitations in memory, software support, and customization compared to contemporary PCs. Its influence on personal computing history remains profound.
content:
Apple's most legendary computer has two legacies: there's the computer itself, and there's the commercial. That commercial. Only a couple of days before Steve Jobs debuted the computer that would both help cement his legacy and contribute to his unceremonious exile from Apple, the company dropped a Super Bowl ad that is still one of the most iconic commercials of all time. It raised both the hype and the stakes for the Macintosh in a big way.
The Macintosh wasn't a great computer, at least at first. It didn't have enough memory; there wasn't enough software that supported it; it wasn't customizable in the ways PC users needed at the time. I …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 麦金塔永远改变了计算机
zh.summary: 麦金塔通过其创新的界面设计和传奇性的超级碗广告改变了计算，尽管原始设备在内存、软件支持和自定义方面与当代个人电脑相比有局限性。它对个人计算历史的影响仍然深远。

fr.title: Le Macintosh a changé les ordinateurs pour toujours
fr.summary: Le Macintosh a transformé l'informatique grâce à son design d'interface innovant et sa légendaire publicité du Super Bowl, bien que l'appareil original ait eu des limitations en mémoire, support logiciel et personnalisation par rapport aux PC contemporains. Son influence sur l'histoire de l'informatique personnelle reste profonde.

de.title: Der Macintosh veränderte Computer für immer
de.summary: Der Macintosh veränderte das Computing durch sein innovatives Interface-Design und seine legendäre Super-Bowl-Werbung, obwohl das ursprüngliche Gerät Einschränkungen bei Speicher, Softwareunterstützung und Anpassung im Vergleich zu zeitgenössischen PCs hatte. Sein Einfluss auf die Geschichte des Personal Computing bleibt tiefgreifend.

es.title: El Macintosh cambió las computadoras para siempre
es.summary: El Macintosh transformó la computación a través de su innovador diseño de interfaz y su legendario anuncio del Super Bowl, aunque el dispositivo original tenía limitaciones en memoria, soporte de software y personalización en comparación con las PC contemporáneas. Su influencia en la historia de la computación personal sigue siendo profunda.

title: Apple’s long, bitter App Store antitrust war
summary: Apple faces ongoing antitrust battles over its App Store control, echoing Microsoft's 1998 monopoly trial when the software giant's 80%+ market dominance faced legal scrutiny. The article examines Apple's legal challenges and how the company's platform control parallels historic antitrust concerns.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the legal travails of Big Tech, follow Adi Robertson. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
The year was 1998, and reigning personal computer giant Microsoft was on trial for violating antitrust laws, including by targeting its smaller competitor Apple. Apple occupied only a fraction of the PC market, while Microsoft held north of 80 percent. But its cross-platform QuickTime multimedia player threatened Microsoft's own offerings, and a court determined that Microsoft …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果长期、激烈的App Store反垄断战争
zh.summary: 苹果面临关于App Store控制权的持续反垄断诉讼,这呼应了1998年微软垄断案,当时这家软件巨头80%以上的市场份额面临法律审查。文章审视了苹果的法律挑战,以及该公司的平台控制如何与历史性反垄断关切相平行。

fr.title: La longue et amère guerre antitrust d'Apple contre l'App Store
fr.summary: Apple fait face à des batailles antitrust en cours concernant le contrôle de son App Store, rappelant le procès en monopole de Microsoft en 1998, lorsque la domination de marché de plus de 80% du géant du logiciel a été soumise à un examen juridique. L'article examine les défis juridiques d'Apple et comment le contrôle de la plateforme de la société fait écho aux préoccupations antitrust historiques.

de.title: Apples langer und erbitterter Antitrust-Krieg um den App Store
de.summary: Apple sieht sich laufenden Kartellkämpfen um die Kontrolle seines App Store konfrontiert, was an Microsofts Monopolverfahren von 1998 erinnert, als die über 80%ige Marktdominanz des Softwaregiganten einer rechtlichen Überprüfung ausgesetzt war. Der Artikel untersucht Apples rechtliche Herausforderungen und wie die Plattformkontrolle des Unternehmens historische Kartellbedenken widerspiegelt.

es.title: La larga y amarga guerra antimonopolio de Apple contra la App Store
es.summary: Apple enfrenta batallas antimonopolio en curso sobre el control de su App Store, recordando el juicio por monopolio de Microsoft en 1998, cuando el dominio de mercado de más del 80% del gigante del software enfrentó escrutinio legal. El artículo examina los desafíos legales de Apple y cómo el control de la plataforma de la empresa refleja preocupaciones antimonopolio históricas.

title: Pints meet prop bets: Polymarket’s “Situation Room” pop-up bar in DC
summary: Polymarket, a leading prediction market platform, launched a pop-up bar called the "Situation Room" in Washington DC to build community among its prop betting users. The venue merges prediction markets with social gathering in the nation's capital.
content: Why did a leading prediction market feel the need for an in-person bar in DC?

zh.title: 品脱遇上对赌：Polymarket在华盛顿的"局势室"临时酒吧
zh.summary: 作为领先的预测市场平台，Polymarket在华盛顿特区推出了一个名为"局势室"的临时酒吧，以在其对赌用户中建立社区。该场地在国家首都将预测市场与社交聚集融为一体。

fr.title: Les bières rencontrent les paris : le bar éphémère "Situation Room" de Polymarket à DC
fr.summary: Polymarket, une plateforme de marché de prédiction leader, a lancé un bar éphémère appelé la "Situation Room" à Washington DC pour construire une communauté parmi ses utilisateurs de paris sportifs. Le lieu fusionne les marchés de prédiction avec la réunion sociale dans la capitale du pays.

de.title: Biere treffen Wettquoten: Polymarkets "Situation Room" Pop-up-Bar in DC
de.summary: Polymarket, eine führende Vorhersagemarktplattform, eröffnete eine Pop-up-Bar namens "Situation Room" in Washington DC, um eine Gemeinschaft unter seinen Prop-Betting-Benutzern aufzubauen. Der Veranstaltungsort verbindet Vorhersagemärkte mit sozialen Versammlungen in der Hauptstadt des Landes.

es.title: Las cervezas se encuentran con las apuestas: el bar emergente "Situation Room" de Polymarket en DC
es.summary: Polymarket, una plataforma líder de mercado de predicción, lanzó un bar emergente llamado "Situation Room" en Washington DC para construir comunidad entre sus usuarios de apuestas. El lugar fusiona mercados de predicción con encuentros sociales en la capital del país.

title: Polygraphs have major flaws. Are there better options?
summary: Polygraph tests have significant scientific flaws, prompting researchers to explore alternative lie detection methods. However, experts remain skeptical about whether truly reliable lie detection is scientifically possible.
content: Research proceeds on alternatives, but some doubt whether true lie detection is possible.

zh.title: 测谎仪有重大缺陷。有更好的选择吗？
zh.summary: 测谎仪测试存在重大的科学缺陷,促使研究人员探索替代的测谎方法。但是,专家们对是否真正可靠的测谎方法在科学上是可能的仍然持怀疑态度。

fr.title: Les polygraphes ont des failles majeures. Y a-t-il de meilleures options?
fr.summary: Les tests de polygraphe ont des failles scientifiques importantes, incitant les chercheurs à explorer d'autres méthodes de détection de mensonges. Cependant, les experts restent sceptiques quant à la possibilité scientifique d'une détection de mensonges vraiment fiable.

de.title: Polygraphentests haben große Mängel. Gibt es bessere Optionen?
de.summary: Polygraphentests weisen erhebliche wissenschaftliche Mängel auf, was Forscher dazu veranlasst, alternative Lügenerkennungsmethoden zu erforschen. Allerdings bleiben Experten skeptisch, ob eine wirklich zuverlässige Lügenerkennung wissenschaftlich möglich ist.

es.title: Los polígrafos tienen grandes defectos. ¿Hay mejores opciones?
es.summary: Las pruebas de polígrafo tienen defectos científicos significativos, lo que impulsa a los investigadores a explorar métodos alternativos de detección de mentiras. Sin embargo, los expertos siguen siendo escépticos sobre si una detección de mentiras realmente confiable es científicamente posible.
